acceptance_criteria: A Rust validator enforces stage presence, handoffs, profile evidence, parent/child links, and changed-path coverage.
CI runs the validator separately from the Rust workspace quality gate.

open_questions.question: Changed-path coverage ignores work-items/ because those artifacts are process metadata rather than target implementation paths.

functional_requirements: Add a reusable process validation library and CLI.
Add valid fixtures and negative validator tests.
Add CI workflow and PR template enforcement.
non_functional_requirements: Validator failures must be specific enough to fix quickly.
CI must run before relying on the Rust workspace workflow alone.
out_of_scope: Dynamic policy evaluation beyond process artifact validation.
success_metrics: Validator tests cover the required failure modes.
The dedicated CI workflow runs the validator command.
assumptions: A shared CLI crate is acceptable for repository-wide tooling.
